# Communications notice - **<TITLE/OUTPUT NAME>**

Add details below and check off each item when completed.
Add further details (for example translation or design needs) and break out into sub-issues where necessary.

## Main info
- [ ] Confirm output type (report/blog post/newsletter/social post/other):
- [ ] Confirm audience:
- [ ] Confirm channel(s):
- [ ] Target publish date:
- [ ] Confirm any funder/partner acknowledgement requirements

## Drafting and review
- [ ] Draft prepared
- [ ] Draft reviewed by <name/team>
- [ ] Design/formatting complete (if applicable)
- [ ] Approved for publication

## Publication
- [ ] Published
- [ ] Link added below:
- [ ] Shared internally/announced to team
